message:
test(mission_loop): add 20 property-based tests for safety envelope and conflict detection

Property tests covering: envelope cap enforcement, conflict count bounding,
detection determinism, false positive absence, conflict type classification,
strategy correctness (PriorityWins/FirstClaimWins/ManualResolution), message
generation, serde roundtrips, state monotonicity, history bounding, expired
and non-exclusive reservation exclusion, and self-conflict prevention.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
